div1.entryFree: Unkindly, adv. in a harsh and ungentle manner: Mids. III, 2, 183. Tit. V, 3, 104. Caes. III, 2, 184. take it not u. (== don't take it ill) Shr. III, 1, 57. I take it much u. Oth. I, 1, 1. I hope it remains not u. with your lordship, Tim. III, 6, 39 (you owe me no grudge). cf. Unkindness Tim. III, 6, 39
